name: extalworldbuilder
description: A cross-platform worldbuilding application powered by Electron.
copyright: Copyright © 2026 Andrew D Nusz. All rights reserved.

scripts.dist: npm run fonts:generate && node scripts/download-llama-wheel.js && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: npm run fonts:generate && node scripts/download-llama-wheel.js && electron-builder --win dir --config.win.signAndEditExecutable=false && node -e "require('rcedit').rcedit('dist/win-unpacked/ExtalWorldBuilder.exe',{icon:'frontend/assets/icon.ico'})"
scripts.dist:linux: npm run fonts:generate && node scripts/download-llama-wheel.js && electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:mac: npm run fonts:generate && node scripts/download-llama-wheel.js && electron-builder --mac zip
